case_title: LAIEN LI ET AL VS. AMAZON.COM, INC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM LILLY ALEMAYEHU FILED BY DEFENDANT AMAZON.COM, INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFFS LAIEN LI AND JOYCE FANYING ZENG ARE NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT AMAZON.COM, INC. IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM REPRESENTED BY LILLY ALEMAYEHU. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF [HEARING 05-29-24 @ 8:30AM] SERVED APR-01-2024, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AMAZON.COM, INC.

REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM LILLY ALEMAYEHU FILED BY DEFENDANT AMAZON.COM, INC.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL [AGENT FOR SERVICE - KOY SAECHAO] FILED BY PLAINTIFF LI, LAIEN AS TO DEFENDANT AMAZON.COM, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY LI, LAIEN ZENG, JOYCE FANYING AS TO DEFENDANT AMAZON.COM, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-29-2024 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
